title: Luxuriant White Wine Saudi-Arabian Saffron Bisque
description: A rich and creamy saffron-infused bisque made with white wine, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 5 minutes until softened.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger; cook for 1 minute.
Add the white wine and bring to a boil, scraping the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the saffron threads, dashi extract, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
In a separate saucepan, whisk together the milk and heavy cream. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and slowly pour the milk mixture into the saucepan with the saffron mixture, whisking constantly.
Add the flour and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Strain the bisque into individual mini cocottes or ramekins.
Serve immediately, garnished with a sprinkle of saffron threads and a dollop of heavy cream if desired.
